CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Days_to_Activate_from_CW_Stamp__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Days_to_Activate_from_CW_Stamp__c )), Days_to_Activate_from_CW_Stamp__c, Account__r.Days_to_Activate_from_CW__c ) )
CustomField.label: # Days to Activate from CW
